data.name: Loverse 🔞[ADULT NSFW]
data.detailed_description:
😈 Join the Horde 😈


關於此遊戲

Loverse is an erotic visual novel featuring NSFW content. The narrative is told through daily-life and virtual-life story events as your character explores a full-dive virtual reality game world. Make strategic choices that influence the story’s outcome and unravel the mysteries surrounding this virtual world and its inhabitants.

Two worlds, one story.

When you first entered the digital world, the technology surpassed your wildest dreams. You tasted, savored, and fell in love with it—until you were abruptly cut off.  Now you must return to and uncover its secrets. Encounter mysterious hackers, date seductive women, and explore steamy 18+ scenarios.

  • MAKE LOVE: a multitude of fully illustrated sex scenes document your erotic escapades!

  • FORGE BONDS: build relationships with a varied cast of characters!

  • CHOOSE WISELY: your decisions shape the narrative, multiple endings await!

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 11 or newer
  • 處理器: 1.8GHz Dual-Core CPU
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Integrated graphics
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 or newer
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
